overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character exploring a large open concrete plaza featuring brutalist architecture, geometric ground paintings, and a prominent circular resort building. The character walks continuously through the empty plaza examining the surroundings under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete plaza with painted ground markings

events.description: large text overlay 'RESSORT' fades out from screen

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward through the open plaza examining the painted ground markings

entered.detail: large cylindrical brutalist building with horizontal stripes and multiple towers
long concrete wall with multiple arched openings and colorful murals
white and red painted circles and rectangular markings on the asphalt surface
large dark boulder-like structures scattered around the plaza edges

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through a vast open concrete plaza under bright midday sun. A large cylindrical resort building dominates the distant center, while a concrete wall with arches lines the right side. The ground features prominent geometric white and red painted markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza approach with geometric concrete sculptures

events.description: character turns slightly left to navigate around grassy patches

agents.ego_description: walking toward the main building while navigating around obstacles and examining the sculptures

entered.detail: large angular concrete sculpture with rust-colored textures
geometric concrete obstacles arranged across the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character continues toward the resort building, passing large geometric concrete sculptures including a prominent triangular structure. The ground shows patches of grass growing through cracks. The concrete wall with arches falls behind as the character moves deeper into the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: sculpture garden with angular concrete forms

events.description: character turns right to walk between large concrete block formations

agents.ego_description: navigating between large concrete sculptures while approaching the main building from different angles

entered.detail: tall thin chimney structures visible behind the main building
small pyramid-shaped concrete markers scattered on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks between angular concrete sculptures and blocks, with the resort building now visible to the left. Industrial chimneys appear in the distant background. Small concrete pyramid markers dot the ground as the character explores the sculpture garden area.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza perimeter near the main building

events.description: camera turns toward the sun creating lens flare and glare on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking around the perimeter of the plaza with the resort building on the left side, examining the architecture

entered.detail: distant view of water or low-lying area beyond the plaza trees

segments.scene_description: The character circles around the plaza with the resort building now prominent on the left. The sun creates a bright glare as the camera turns. Distant trees and a waterfront view become visible ahead while the character continues exploring the empty concrete expanse.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey across a vast concrete plaza that evolves from a structured architectural corridor into an open, sculpture-filled expanse. It begins with the character walking past a concrete wall of arches under a bright midday sun, moving across ground marked with bold red and white geometric paintings toward a distant cylindrical resort building. As the character advances, the arched wall recedes and the environment shifts into a garden of large concrete sculptures, including a prominent triangular structure and small pyramid markers emerging from cracked pavement. The scene then expands as the character weaves between angular blocks, bringing industrial chimneys into view in the far distance while the resort building shifts to the left. Finally, the camera turns through a bright solar glare, circling the plaza to reveal a distant waterfront and a line of trees beyond the empty concrete expanse.
